description: We're looking for a backend engineer to help build our platform.
descriptionPlain: We're looking for a backend engineer to help build our platform.

lists.content:
• Strong experience with Go or Python
  • Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis
  • Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes

• Experience with Kafka or RabbitMQ
  • AWS or GCP experience

description: Join our frontend team building with React and TypeScript.
descriptionPlain: Join our frontend team building with React and TypeScript.

lists.content:
• Build and maintain our React-based dashboard
  • Work with our design team on new features
